Built for enterprise IT leaders

THE TRAI INC STANDARD

Engineering standards we don't cut corners on.

Built for the long haul

Whether you're launching a local shop or scaling a cloud platform, your architecture is clean, modular, and ready for whatever growth throws at it.

Dedicated Senior Talent

You work directly with experienced senior engineers who take full ownership of your project end-to-end.

Fixed Pricing. No Surprises.

One clear price. One timeline. No hourly billing surprises or scope creep. You'll know exactly what you're spending before a single line of code is written.

WHO WE ARE

A team of builders, engineers, and creators.

We are Trai Inc, an innovation lab dedicated to building cutting-edge software, mobile applications, and AI solutions. We bridge the gap between complex engineering and your business goals.

Scope Your Project

Our Mission

To deliver enterprise-grade engineering with complete transparency. No hidden costs, just high-quality code and fixed-price guarantees.

Our Expertise

We specialize in modern web platforms, native mobile apps, and integrating advanced AI agents that actually drive business value.

Our Approach

No middlemen or bloated account management. You work directly with senior engineers who treat your product as their own.

QUESTIONS & ANSWERS

Frequently Asked Questions

Our senior engineers work in rapid sprints, and most projects ship in 4 to 8 weeks depending on complexity — simpler builds like a business website can be live even faster.

It depends on your business size. A business website for a local shop starts at ₹15,000. A custom MVP or internal tool typically runs ₹1.5L-₹3L. Growth-stage systems — CRMs, automation, multi-platform builds — run ₹3L-₹5L. For enterprise-scale or highly custom requirements, we quote after a scoping call. Get in touch for a fixed-price estimate.

We offer an annual maintenance contract (20% of the initial project cost) covering platform updates, security patches, and minor bug fixes. For larger feature additions, we scope and quote them as separate change requests — you're never locked out of your own product.

We believe in complete transparency. We've published a due-diligence checklist covering code ownership, app store accounts, and hosting. We assign full source code and IP to you upon final payment, and give you direct access to all infrastructure.

Trai Inc Services

AI-native software engineering — delivering custom software, mobile apps, and automation systems for businesses across India.
